description: Build the Deep AI Integration layer - Universal AI Assistant that can perform cross-app actions. Includes the assistant core, action/tool registration system, natural language intent router, voice interface module, and a typed React Query API client SDK. This is the 'Quant AI Everywhere' killer feature.
steps: 1. Create packages/ai/src/assistant/types.ts - Define interfaces: AITool (name, description, parameters as Zod-like schema, handler), AIAction (tool, args, result), AppCapability (appName, tools[]), IntentRouterResult (targetApp, tool, confidence, parsedArgs), AssistantContext (userId, currentApp, conversationHistory, crossAppState).

2. Create packages/ai/src/assistant/tool-registry.ts - ToolRegistry class: registerTool(app, tool), getToolsForApp(app), getAllTools(), findToolByName(name), getToolDescriptions() returning formatted tool list for LLM system prompts.

3. Create packages/ai/src/assistant/intent-router.ts - IntentRouter class that uses the AIEngine to classify user intent: parseIntent(userMessage, context) -> IntentRouterResult. Maps natural language to specific app tools. E.g., 'Send John a message' -> quantchat.sendMessage. Uses system prompt with all registered tools.

4. Create packages/ai/src/assistant/action-executor.ts - ActionExecutor class: execute(action: AIAction, context) -> result. Validates args against tool schema, calls the tool handler, returns structured result. Handles errors gracefully.

5. Create packages/ai/src/assistant/assistant.ts - UniversalAssistant class: the main orchestrator. Methods: processMessage(message, context) -> response. Combines intent routing, action execution, and response generation. Maintains conversation state. Can chain multiple actions.

6. Create packages/ai/src/assistant/tools/ directory with app-specific tool definitions: quantchat-tools.ts (sendMessage, createGroup, searchContacts), quantmail-tools.ts (composeEmail, searchEmails, summarizeThread), quantai-tools.ts (generateImage, translateText, analyzeCode), quantsync-tools.ts (createPost, searchContent), quantube-tools.ts (searchVideos, playVideo), quantneon-tools.ts (editPhoto), quantmax-tools.ts (findMatches), quantads-tools.ts (manageCampaign).
7. Create packages/ai/src/assistant/index.ts barrel export for the assistant module.
8. Create packages/ai/src/voice/types.ts - VoiceConfig, TranscriptionResult, TTSRequest, TTSResult, VoiceCommand interfaces.

9. Create packages/ai/src/voice/speech-to-text.ts - SpeechToTextService class wrapping Whisper API: transcribe(audioBuffer) -> TranscriptionResult, streamTranscribe(audioStream) -> AsyncGenerator<partial text>.
10. Create packages/ai/src/voice/text-to-speech.ts - TextToSpeechService class wrapping OpenAI TTS: synthesize(text, voice, speed) -> audioBuffer. Supports multiple voices.
11. Create packages/ai/src/voice/voice-commander.ts - VoiceCommander class: listens for wake word 'Hey Quant', processes voice commands through UniversalAssistant, speaks back results via TTS.
12. Create packages/ai/src/voice/index.ts barrel export.
13. Update packages/ai/src/index.ts to export assistant/* and voice/* modules.
14. Create packages/api-client/package.json with name @quant/api-client, dependencies: @tanstack/react-query, zod, type: module.
15. Create packages/api-client/tsconfig.json extending root.
16. Create packages/api-client/src/core/http-client.ts - Type-safe HTTP client with interceptors, auth token injection, error handling, retry logic.
17. Create packages/api-client/src/core/types.ts - APIResponse<T>, APIError, PaginatedResponse<T>, RequestConfig interfaces.
18. Create packages/api-client/src/hooks/useQuery.ts - Typed React Query hooks factory: createQueryHook<TParams, TResponse>(endpoint, options).
19. Create packages/api-client/src/hooks/useMutation.ts - Typed mutation hooks with optimistic updates: createMutationHook<TParams, TResponse>(endpoint, options).
20. Create packages/api-client/src/hooks/useSubscription.ts - WebSocket subscription hook: useSubscription<T>(channel, handler) using @quant/realtime.
21. Create packages/api-client/src/hooks/useInfiniteQuery.ts - Infinite scroll hook for paginated endpoints.
22. Create packages/api-client/src/endpoints/chat.ts - QuantChat API hooks: useConversations, useSendMessage, useMessages.
23. Create packages/api-client/src/endpoints/mail.ts - QuantMail API hooks: useInbox, useSendEmail, useSearchEmails.
24. Create packages/api-client/src/endpoints/ai.ts - QuantAI API hooks: useAIChat, useAIStream, useVoiceTranscribe.
25. Create packages/api-client/src/index.ts barrel export.

26. Create packages/ai/src/__tests__/assistant.test.ts - Test ToolRegistry (register/find tools), IntentRouter (classify intents), ActionExecutor (execute tools), UniversalAssistant (end-to-end flow).
27. Create packages/api-client/src/__tests__/hooks.test.ts - Test hook factories produce correct query keys and configs.
28. Update root tsconfig.json paths to add @quant/api-client mapping.
29. Update root pnpm-workspace.yaml if needed (already includes packages/*).
acceptance_criteria: UniversalAssistant.processMessage correctly routes 'send a message to John' to quantchat sendMessage tool
ToolRegistry can register and retrieve tools for all 9 apps
IntentRouter returns correct app and tool with confidence score
Voice module exports SpeechToTextService and TextToSpeechService with correct interfaces
API client exports typed React Query hooks for chat, mail, and AI endpoints
All new code typechecks with tsc --noEmit
All tests pass with vitest run
